description: Business letter. In Judaeo-Arabic. Dating: Likely 12th century, based on handwriting. Mentions red sulfur (kibrīt aḥmar), the estate of the addressee's dead brother, and perhaps Jibla in Yemen. Urges a response quickly, because the sender doesn't know if he'll remain in his present location for one day or twenty days.
description_he: מכתב עסקי ביהודית-ערבית. ייתכן המאה ה-12. מוזכרים גפרית אדומה, עיזבון אחי הנמען המנוח, ואולי ג'יבלה שביתמן. ממהר לקבל תשובה.
